mapper.sql: id, code, name, type, edit_status, publish_status, map_file_url, map_version, resolution, origin_x, origin_y, edited_by, edited_at, published_by, published_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scene_map (code, name, type, edit_status, publish_status, map_file_url, map_version, resolution, origin_x, origin_y, edited_by, edited_at, published_by, published_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{type}, #{editStatus}, #{publishStatus}, #{mapFileUrl}, #{mapVersion}, #{resolution}, #{originX}, #{originY}, #{editedBy}, #{editedAt}, #{publishedBy}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
